name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Large White In stock!!️
Dior Nomad Tote / Lunch Box Bag 🍱
Another heavy recommendation! The Lunch Box Bag has been a hit in recent years!
Every brand has released one, it's simply cute on everyone
The wicker pattern of super soft calfskin is as full as a pillow
I love its gunmetal metal buckle even more, a detail that kills it for detail lovers
Dark style lovers go for it! I'll wear it first haha
Size: 22*13*9.5cm
